families.action_taken: RepoX now uses runtime/appshell for AppShell source checks and consumes the current root allowlist plus active layout exceptions for top-level structure checks.
families.example: Legacy RepoX checks expected retired root paths such as appshell/... and a pre-contract top-level root list.

families.action_taken: The rule implementation path is now included in every group cache dependency hash.
families.example: RepoX group cache reused old violation payloads after check_repox_rules.py changed because the rule implementation was not part of the dependency hash.

families.action_taken: Classified as broad documentation status migration, not safe to mass-edit under 10G.
families.source: docs/** status headers and RepoX docs.canon group

families.action_taken: Classified as canonical-index migration work requiring a source-of-truth review or generator path.
families.example: INV-CANON-INDEX: canonical doc not listed in CANON_INDEX: docs/agents/AGENT_MIRROR_POLICY.md

families.action_taken: Preserved as historical/generated-reference debt pending a quarantine/archive policy task.
Deferred because adding semantic contract entries is authority-sensitive.
families.example: INV-NEW-CONTRACT-REQUIRES-ENTRY: semantic contract token missing registry entry contract.arch.graph.v1 (data/architecture/architecture_graph.v1.json)
families.source: architecture contract tokens and semantic contract registry

families.action_taken: Kept blocking; product/distribution proof is outside 10G.
Classified but not remapped broadly; requires domain-owner path review.
families.source: RepoX runtime policy checks for retired domain roots such as embodiment, geo, universe, worldgen, and diag

families.action_taken: Deferred until a tool-version/audit-output refresh task can identify the canonical generator and acceptance rule.
families.example: INV-TOOL-VERSION-MISMATCH: hash mismatch for tools/xstack/compatx/compatx.py (expected 14038782c57cde4ba0b1645fefa3b6b23d3d488a60201fa66d39c6470d503d1a, got 684fce553b870fea424c8a49f85f41958a61f5512ee0965186e50c210b934b6c)
families.source: tool version registry and docs/audit/auditx generated evidence

families.action_taken: Kept blocking until a narrower owner-specific remediation task can prove each rule family.
families.example: INV-REPLAY-REFUSES-CONTRACT-MISMATCH: universe\universe_contract_enforcer.py missing token Replay requires SessionSpec.semantic_contract_registry_hash

head: ae0ded5997b8c496ea992166913e8857ca9a8372
no_candidate_reason: Remaining RepoX families are broad docs/canon status, contract acceptance, distribution descriptor, or domain-path policy work rather than a safe single 10G fix.
